title: Magically Spicy German Grape Tomatoes Skillet
description: A spicy German dish featuring grape tomatoes, perfect for a date night, this recipe is egg-free friendly and has a nice aerated texture from the salt-bake method.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large oven-safe skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the sliced German sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the halved grape tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
